headline: How The Netflix (NFLX) Investment Narrative Is Shifting After The Warner Bros. Discovery Decision
summary: Netflix's updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$111.43 to US$113.17 per share, a modest adjustment that still matters if you are tracking the stock closely. This change sits against a split in Wall Street commentary, with one camp leaning into renewed focus on stand alone growth and another questioning valuation and competitive risks after the decision not to pursue Warner Bros. Discovery. Read on to see how these differing views are shaping the evolving Netflix story and how you...
